overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a medieval harbor city during golden hour. The character traverses wooden docks, narrow cobblestone streets, covered walkways, and stone staircases while passing various NPCs engaged in daily activities.

scene_state.functional_zone: open wooden harbor dock with large water wheel

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the wooden dock with swords on his back, passing by the large water wheel structure

entered.detail: massive wooden water wheel with metal reinforcement standing on the dock
large wooden sailing vessel with furled sails moored in the harbor
weathered wooden planks forming the dock walkway
calm water of the harbor reflecting the golden hour light
stone towers and buildings of the city visible across the water

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a wide wooden harbor dock during golden hour. Geralt walks forward past a massive water wheel on the left, with a large sailing ship moored in the harbor to the right. The distant city skyline is visible across the calm water as the character moves steadily along the weathered planks.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone street between historic stone buildings

events.description: exits open dock into narrow cobblestone street between tall stone buildings

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the narrow street passing townspeople and dock workers

notable_agents.action: shirtless dock worker walking toward the camera
townspeople standing near a wooden doorway

entered.detail: tall stone building with small windows and weathered walls
tall stone building with wooden accents and arched doorways
irregular cobblestones forming the narrow street surface
large arched wooden door with metal bands set in stone

segments.scene_description: Geralt turns from the dock into a narrow cobblestone street flanked by tall historic stone buildings. The space is enclosed with only partial sky visible overhead. Various NPCs including dock workers and townspeople walk through or stand along the street, creating a moderate crowd density in this urban corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden dock walkway along the harbor

events.description: enters covered wooden walkway along the waterfront with wooden support pillars

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the covered dock area passing NPCs and wooden structures

notable_agents.action: woman in a dress walking alongside the character
dock worker standing near wooden support post

entered.detail: thick wooden pillars supporting the overhead structure of the covered walkway
dark wooden wall of a harbor building with vertical planks
wooden crane framework used for loading ships

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow street onto a semi-covered wooden dock walkway. Thick wooden pillars line the left side supporting an overhead structure that diffuses the sunlight. The harbor water is now visible to the left, and a wooden crane structure stands in the distance. NPCs walk alongside and stand near the wooden building wall on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone alleyway with steep stairs between buildings

events.description: enters dark narrow alley between stone buildings with no sky visible
begins ascending steep stone staircase in the narrow passage

agents.ego_description: Geralt climbing stone stairs in the narrow alley then descending back toward the harbor level

entered.detail: narrow stone passage between tall buildings leading into darkness
steep stone stairs ascending between close stone walls
rough stone wall of the building forming the left side of the alley
simple wooden railing along the right side of the stairs

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters a dark narrow alley between stone buildings where the sky is completely obscured. The lighting drops significantly as he begins ascending a steep stone staircase. The passage is empty of other people, with rough stone walls on both sides and a simple wooden railing. After reaching the top, he descends another set of stairs back toward the harbor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open town square near harbor with water wheel

events.description: exits narrow alley back into open dock area with full sky visibility

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the open town square toward the water wheel and harbor

notable_agents.action: group of townspeople walking and gathering in the square

entered.detail: massive wooden water wheel visible again as the character returns to the dock area
open plaza area with wooden buildings and activity
single leafy tree growing near the wooden buildings

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges from the dark alley back into the open dock area, returning to the town square near the harbor. The large water wheel is visible again to the left, and a tree stands near the wooden buildings ahead. The space opens up with full sky visibility and golden hour lighting, with scattered townspeople walking through the plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, sunlit harbor through the claustrophobic depths of a medieval city before returning to the golden light of the waterfront. It begins on a wide wooden dock where Geralt passes a massive water wheel and a moored sailing ship under a clear golden sky. As he turns away from the water, the scene shifts into a narrow cobblestone street flanked by tall stone buildings and crowded with townspeople, before opening up again onto a semi-covered wooden walkway supported by thick pillars. The camera then follows him into a dark, secluded alley where the sky vanishes and the lighting drops significantly as he ascends and descends steep stone staircases between rough walls. Finally, the environment expands once more as he emerges from the shadows back into the open town square, returning to the sight of the water wheel and the warm, ambient glow of the harbor.
